# OpenStudy v0.1.0

The first public release of OpenStudy turns Markdown-first study material into a structured desktop practice workflow.

## Highlights

- Start from Markdown-first study material and editable question-bank content
- Use AI to clean up and structure raw study notes into answerable questions
- Practice with keyboard-friendly navigation and retry support
- Ask AI for in-context explanations while solving questions
- Track wrong answers, revisit them, and generate study insights manually
- Build and ship installers for Windows, Apple Silicon macOS, and Linux

## Included In This Release

- Initial cross-platform desktop packaging
- Bilingual README and open-source collaboration setup
- Unified release artifact naming
- Release automation through GitHub Actions

## Known Limitations

- The current product direction is Markdown-first rather than multi-format document ingestion
- Very large Markdown collections are not auto-restructured beyond model context limits
- macOS distribution is currently unsigned
